assertions.title: Dashboard exposes an "Onboard a Device" entry point

steps.expected: Settings sidebar test confirms single Onboard action row, description copy, and blue CTA
steps.observed: SettingsSidebar.onboardSponsor.test.tsx passed including "renders the Onboard a Device action row with the blue CTA".

assertions.title: Entry is discoverable from keyboard and screen readers

steps.action: Inspect evidence from assigned test runs only
steps.expected: Focus-ring + keyboard Enter/Space activation + accessible name + no duplicate affordance
steps.observed: Accessible-name and no-duplicate checks are covered, but no direct keyboard focus-ring/Enter/Space activation evidence in the assigned runs.

assertions.issues: Insufficient direct evidence from the requested command set for keyboard activation/focus-ring behavior.

steps.expected: Three groups render in order and CTA remains disabled until valid
steps.observed: OnboardSponsorScreens.test.tsx passed cases covering group presence, required validations, and CTA gating/enabling.

assertions.title: Generated package round-trips through decode_bfonboard_package

steps.action: Inspect evidence from assigned test runs only
steps.expected: Generated package decoded with correct password and wrong-password decode error path
steps.observed: Assigned runs did not provide direct decode round-trip + wrong-password decode-path proof for this assertion.

assertions.issues: No direct assertion-level evidence for decode_bfonboard_package round-trip in the specified command set.

assertions.title: Copy and QR hand-off affordances

steps.action: Inspect evidence from assigned test runs only
steps.expected: Textarea full package, copy affordance, and QR scannable round-trip
steps.observed: Assigned runs cover textarea rendering and QR canvas size, but no direct jsqr re-decode evidence for QR scannability.

assertions.issues: Insufficient direct evidence for the QR scannability clause from the specified runs.

assertions.title: UI labels say "Replace Share", never "Rotate Share"

steps.action: Inspect evidence from assigned test runs only
steps.expected: DOM text sweep over all M7-touched surfaces proving zero visible "Rotate Share" strings
steps.observed: No dedicated DOM text sweep evidence for this assertion in the assigned command outputs.

assertions.issues: Assigned runs do not directly assert the explicit no-"Rotate Share" contract sweep.

assertions.title: Paper parity for any new screens

steps.action: Inspect evidence from assigned test runs only
steps.expected: Pixel/parity comparison against Paper references for new onboarding sponsor surfaces
steps.observed: Assigned Vitest/Playwright runs confirm render health but do not provide direct pixel-level parity evidence.

assertions.issues: No direct Paper parity artifact (comparison/screenshot diff) in the specified runs.

assertions.title: Empty or invalid relay overrides rejected

steps.expected: Whitespace/invalid relay entries block CTA with inline validation and re-enable on valid relay
steps.observed: OnboardSponsorScreens.test.tsx passed relay-empty and invalid-wss rejection checks with CTA disabled/cleared transitions.

assertions.title: Threshold misuse t=0 or t>n rejected upstream

steps.expected: Invalid threshold blocks create action with inline error
steps.observed: OnboardSponsorScreens.test.tsx passed "blocks CTA when the active profile threshold is invalid (VAL-ONBOARD-021)".

assertions.title: Keyboard cancellation of in-flight sponsorship

steps.action: Inspect evidence from assigned test runs only
steps.expected: Escape/keyboard cancel clears sponsorship and restores prior focus target
steps.observed: Assigned run includes cancel-confirm and Escape-to-open-confirm behavior only; no direct evidence of full cancel completion + focus restoration + pending envelope removal.

assertions.issues: Insufficient direct evidence for end-to-end keyboard cancellation semantics.

assertions.title: Textarea Tab behavior does not trap focus

steps.action: Inspect evidence from assigned test runs only
steps.expected: Tab/Shift+Tab moves focus forward/back and does not mutate textarea content
steps.observed: Assigned run verifies value unchanged after Tab keydown, but does not directly verify focus traversal and reverse Shift+Tab behavior.

assertions.issues: Insufficient direct evidence for focus-traversal clauses.

assertions.title: Sponsor flow blocked while signer paused

steps.expected: Onboard entry disabled while paused and create action does not dispatch onboarding
steps.observed: SettingsSidebar and OnboardSponsorScreens paused-state checks passed; onboardSponsorFlow test passed dispatch refusal while signerPaused with no pending Onboard operation.

assertions.title: Copy button writes to clipboard and resets state

steps.action: Inspect evidence from assigned test runs only
steps.expected: Clipboard exact write, transient copied reset, subsequent interactions remain functional, repeat copy idempotent
steps.observed: Assigned run verifies clipboard write and transient reset; no direct coverage of post-copy interaction continuity and repeat idempotency.

assertions.issues: Insufficient direct evidence for all clauses of VAL-ONBOARD-025 from the requested command set.

frictions.description: Vitest jsdom emitted known environment warnings (`HTMLCanvasElement.getContext` / `window.scrollTo` not implemented) during runs while tests still passed.
frictions.resolution: Recorded as transcript noise; did not affect exit codes or assertion pass/block decisions.

blockers.description: Requested command set does not directly provide full evidence for some UI-contract clauses (keyboard focus-ring/activation, QR jsqr re-decode, explicit DOM no-"Rotate Share" sweep, Paper parity pixel comparison, full keyboard-cancel focus restoration).
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Constrained to the exact assigned runs; no extra test surfaces executed.

summary: Tested 13 assigned assertions from shell-cli evidence: 5 passed, 0 failed, 8 blocked for insufficient direct evidence in the specified run set.
